name: Siege Engineer
flavor: Realms at War — crews the Trebuchet. Medieval counterpart of the Operator; the Trebuchet is the catapult and the Boulder is the Mortar token.

specialAction.name: Trebuchet
specialAction.summary: Bring up the Trebuchet at the Field edge nearest the engineer, aimed any way. Load the Boulder and loose it onto the Field. Every Warrior within range — friend and foe — takes Wounds equal to the side the Boulder landed on. No valid target needed.

effects.text: Launch the Boulder with the Trebuchet (catapult).
The Trebuchet does not require a valid target.

specialAbility.summary: For each Lightning, move 1 Wound from one Warrior's card onto any other Warrior in play (including an enemy) — redirect the falling rubble.
